title: Oberna antelopum

Oberna antelopum is a member of the genus Oberna, which is a group of plants commonly known as "bush violet". The classification of Oberna antelopum is further divided into the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Angiospermophyta. This classification reflects the plant's characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other organisms.
